## Question Submission

> _Submitted via [aaryaai.dev/contribute](https://aaryaai.dev/contribute). Fill any missing fields before requesting review._

### Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Exam** | <!-- e.g. CCA-F --> |
| **Domain** | <!-- e.g. Domain 1 — Agentic Architecture --> |
| **Difficulty** | <!-- easy / medium / hard --> |
| **Tags** | <!-- comma-separated, e.g. tool-use, mcp --> |
| **Source / Reference** | <!-- URL or doc title --> |

### Question Text

<!-- Write the full question stem here -->

### Options

- **A)** <!-- option text -->
- **B)** <!-- option text -->
- **C)** <!-- option text -->
- **D)** <!-- option text -->

### Correct Answer

<!-- e.g. "C" and brief reason why -->

### Explanation

<!-- Explain why the correct answer is right and why each distractor is wrong -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] Maps to a real domain objective in the exam blueprint
- [ ] Exactly one unambiguous correct answer
- [ ] Distractors are plausible (not obviously wrong)
- [ ] Explanation includes a source/reference link
- [ ] No copyrighted text reproduced verbatim
- [ ] JSON snippet included below (optional but speeds review)

<details>
<summary>JSON snippet (optional)</summary>

```json
{
  "id": "",
  "domain": 0,
  "text": "",
  "options": ["", "", "", ""],
  "answer": 0,
  "explanation": "",
  "tags": [],
  "difficulty": "medium"
}
```

</details>
